config_text:
hostname RTR-001
interface GigabitEthernet0/0
 ip address 192.168.1.1 255.255.255.0
 no shutdown
router ospf 1
 network 192.168.1.0 0.0.0.255 area 0

hostname SW-001
vlan 10
 name Data
interface Ethernet1/1
 switchport mode access
 switchport access vlan 10
 no shutdown
set deviceconfig system hostname FW-001\nset network interface ethernet ethernet1/1 layer3 ip 192.168.3.1/24\nset zone Trust network layer3 ethernet1/1

hostname RTR-003
interface GigabitEthernet0/0
 ip address 192.168.4.1 255.255.255.0
 shutdown
! note: port is admin down due to maintenance
